ruleset.name: aipersimmon-ddd-quality
ruleset.description: AiPersimmon DDD complexity and duplication rules (design-00007). Focused on the signals that matter for a framework-free building-block library: cognitive and cyclomatic complexity, NPath, method/class size, and parameter lists. Kept narrow on purpose — style/formatting is owned by Spotless (google-java-format), architecture by ArchUnit, bytecode defects by SpotBugs. Thresholds start permissive and are ratcheted per plan-00009.
